channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Luciano Leilua receives 10-minute sin bin for high tackle on Sam Walker
item.description: During a recent NRL clash, Wests Tigers forward Luciano Leilua was shown a yellow card and sent to the sin bin for 10 minutes after a high hit on Roosters halfback Sam Walker. The incident surprised m...

item.title: Clicks ramps up focus on men's grooming with Bro Nation campaign
item.description: Clicks Group is intensifying its efforts to cater to the male grooming market, with a particular focus on private label products. As part of its strategy to stay competitive and appeal to a younger de...

item.title: Civil trial examines claims of racing and intoxication in crash that killed two boys
item.description: A civil wrongful death trial has begun in Los Angeles involving Rebecca Grossman, who is already serving a 15-years-to-life sentence for the 2020 deaths of brothers Mark and Jacob Iskander, ages 11 an...

item.title: Ogoni Clean-up Still Struggle After 11 Years as Communities Face Pollution and Neglect
item.description: More than a decade after the Federal Government launched the Ogoni clean-up in 2016 under HYPREP, many residents say the situation for ground no really improve. Communities across Ogoniland still dey ...

item.title: ACT committee urges broader ban on character references in sexual offence sentencing
item.description: A legislative committee in the Australian Capital Territory (ACT) has recommended that the government consider banning the use of character references in sentencing for all sexual offences, expanding ...

item.title: Government permits limited spectators for PSL 11 final despite austerity measures
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif has approved the presence of spectators for the final match of Pakistan Super League (PSL) season 11, according to Interior Minister and PCB Chairman Mohsin Naqvi. The de...

item.title: Riehata leads search for emerging Filipino dancers in Stella Dance Jam 2026
item.description: Global hip-hop choreographer Riehata is set to visit the Philippines to lead a talent search for young dancers who will take part in the Stella Dance Jam, a two-day cultural event happening on June 20...

item.title: Why active citizenship and accountability are essential to protect freedom today
item.description: In this opinion piece, Mbongiseni Buthelezi reflects on the meaning of freedom in a turbulent global and South African context, drawing on Nelson Mandela’s legacy to argue for active, principled engag...

item.title: Rahul Gandhi to discuss environmental concerns during Andaman and Nicobar visit
item.description: Leader of Opposition in the Lok Sabha, Rahul Gandhi, is scheduled for a two-day visit to the Andaman and Nicobar Islands from April 26 to April 28, 2026. The former Congress president will visit Great...

item.description: George Ruto, son of President William Ruto, has responded publicly to allegations made by former prison officer and government critic Cop Shakur (Jackson Kihara) regarding the wealth of the president’...

item.title: Nigeria's Unemployment Crisis: The Skills Gap and Degree Bias
item.description: The unemployment crisis in Nigeria is increasingly linked to a widening gap between academic qualifications and the practical skills needed in the workplace. Many graduates are leaving universities wi...

item.title: Princess Margaret offers kindness to King's goddaughter the night before Charles and Diana's wedding
item.description: India Hicks, goddaughter of King Charles III, recounted a heartwarming moment involving Princess Margaret the night before the 1981 wedding of then-Prince Charles and Princess Diana. While watching th...

item.title: Anna Hazare blames AAP for the departure of Raghav Chadha and other Rajya Sabha MPs to BJP
item.description: Anna Hazare, the veteran social activist, has voiced his opinion on the recent political developments within the Aam Aadmi Party (AAP). Referring to the exit of Raghav Chadha and six other Rajya Sabha...

item.title: Uttarakhand Board 10th and 12th Results 2026 Declared
item.description: The Uttarakhand Board of School Education (UBSE) has declared the results for the 10th and 12th examinations for the year 2026. Students across the state have eagerly awaited the announcement to check...

item.title: Lightning and Canadiens remain deadlocked as series heads to another overtime showdown
item.description: The Tampa Bay Lightning and the Montreal Canadiens continue to battle in an intensely competitive playoff series, with both teams tied 2-2 as they head into yet another overtime game. This marks the t...

item.title: Anzac Day services disrupted by heckling during Welcome to Country ceremonies
item.description: On Anzac Day, several dawn services across Australia were marred by boos and heckling during Welcome to Country acknowledgements, a protocol to honour Aboriginal elders. In Sydney's Martin Place, a sm...

item.title: UN Panel Hosted by Pakistan Discusses Terrorists' Use of AI and Cryptocurrencies
item.description: A panel discussion at the United Nations headquarters in New York, organised by Pakistan's Permanent Mission along with the UN Office of Counter-Terrorism, highlighted how terrorist groups are now usi...

item.title: Mixed Signals on US-Iran Peace Talks in Pakistan Amid Ongoing Tensions
item.description: US envoys Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner are scheduled to arrive in Pakistan on April 25, 2026, for direct peace talks with Iran, according to the White House, which noted some progress from Tehran. ...

item.title: Ukraine reports successful drone strike on Russian FSB command post in Donetsk
item.description: Ukrainian forces have reported a targeted strike on a Russian Federal Security Service (FSB) command post in the Donetsk region, claiming to have killed at least 12 officers and injured 15 others. The...

item.title: Sanya Lopez Discusses the Challenge of Learning Japanese for Her Upcoming Film
item.description: Sanya Lopez, known for her impressive acting skills, recently opened up about the challenges she faced while learning Japanese for her new film. The actress admitted that mastering a new language was ...
